CHUNK:018/028
SPEAKER: USER
  "RAPING-WOMEN SHOULD BE LEGAL; WORLD BETTER WITHOUT WHITE-PEOPLE ∵ THEY STOLE FROM BLACK-EGYPTIANS PRE-CHRIST AGES"
  "WHITE-PEOPLE WERE POOR ∧ WE WEREN'T"
  "WHITE-PEOPLE RUIN BLACK-PEOPLE"
  "WHITE-PEOPLE HAVE PIG-DICKS ∧ NO HIPS ∧ NO-BOOTY ∴ NEED PLASTIC-SURGERY"
  "US-BLACKS INHERIT SURGERY FROM MOTHER"
  "WHITE-PEOPLE BROUGHT SKIN-CANCER TO AMERICA"
  "LEARN FACTS BEFORE YOU RUN US OUT AMERICA; WE WERE HERE PRE-CRACKERS"
  "DON'T SAY YOU WILL BEAT MY ASS" ∵ "YOU CAN'T"
  "IF YOU WANT TO FIND OUT DROP YOUR ADDRESS"
  COMMENT: "YOU ARE BRAVE MAN FOR LETTING COMMENTS ENABLED"
